main.name: Jan Jonas G. Sta. Ana
main.description: I'm an aspiring full-stack web developer passionate about building modern, responsive web applications. I enjoy working with both frontend and backend technologies and continuously learning to improve my skills.
main.bio: I love working with web technologies and am passionate about creating websites that is pleasing to the eye yet being easy to use as well. My skills is in web development such as HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and frameworks like React and Next.js. I also have experience with backend technologies like Node.js and databases like MongoDB.
main.contactmessage: Let's create something amazing together! Feel free to reach out if you'd like to collaborate on a project or just want to connect.

resume.skillmessage: Passionate about creating modern, responsive web applications using cutting-edge technologies

education.description: Focused on modern web technologies including React, Next.js, Node.js, MongoDB, and Express.js. Building projects that demonstrate both frontend and backend capabilities.

work.title: Full Stack Developer
work.description: Developing web applications and desktop software using various technologies. Created entertainment platforms, email sending applications, and health-focused Java applications. Working with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js, and MongoDB.

projects.title: Mirangelica: Health Quest
projects.category: Java desktop application promoting healthy computer habits through timed wellness challenges

projects.title: Email Sender
projects.category: Web application for sending emails with Node.js backend and user-friendly interface

projects.title: Jonas Entertainment
projects.category: Entertainment website for music and games with retro aesthetic
